confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_b5db834e-12e4-48db-b24f-8f93381930db read back as received

evidence: reconcile inspect found rf_lifecycle_frontmatter_40_297f1ab292bd and rf_terminal_evidence_40_34cb67c21f64
task reconcile repair required a prior task reconcile record; direct repair by finding id failed with Finding not found
proposal: Provide a single guided lifecycle-reconcile command for this common split-brain case, with a compact diagnosis and the exact next sanctioned command.
payload.recommendation: Treat as execution-priority ergonomics/CAPA for task lifecycle authority surfaces.
payload.summary: During narada-andrey next loop, task 40 had frontmatter status closed while task-lifecycle SQLite still said claimed. task close refused claimed->closed, task report refused because another surface saw closed, reconcile repair first had to be recorded before it could be applied, then report/review could close. The path is principled but too hard to discover during normal architect duty.
payload.title: Task lifecycle drift repair path is too high-friction
